title: 1993 Senegalese presidential election
summary: Presidential elections were held in Senegal on 21 February 1993. Incumbent president Abdou Diouf of the Socialist Party defeated seven other candidates, receiving 58% of the vote. Voter turnout was 51%.
text:
Presidential elections were held in Senegal on 21 February 1993. Incumbent president Abdou Diouf of the Socialist Party defeated seven other candidates, receiving 58% of the vote. Voter turnout was 51%.

Results
